---
title: "Social Economy Data"
format: html
---

# Social Economy Data

This section presents interactive visual tools related to the social economy ecosystem.

## Interactive Dashboard

```{html}
<script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.30.0.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/d3@7"></script>

<div style="margin-bottom:1rem;">
  <label><strong>Select indicator:</strong></label>
  <select id="indicatorSelect" style="margin-left:10px;"></select>
</div>

<div id="chart" style="width:100%;height:500px;"></div>

<div id="summary" style="margin-top:1.5rem;"></div>

<script>
d3.csv("data/social_economy_data.csv").then(function(data) {

  const numericColumns = Object.keys(data[0]).filter(col => col !== "year");

  const select = document.getElementById("indicatorSelect");

  numericColumns.forEach(col => {
    const option = document.createElement("option");
    option.value = col;
    option.text = col.replaceAll("_", " ");
    select.appendChild(option);
  });

  function drawChart(indicator) {

    const years = data.map(d => d.year);
    const values = data.map(d => +d[indicator]);

    const trace = {
      x: years,
      y: values,
      type: "scatter",
      mode: "lines+markers",
      line: {shape: "spline"}
    };

    const layout = {
      title: indicator.replaceAll("_", " ") + " (Time Series)",
      xaxis: { title: "Year" },
      yaxis: { title: indicator.replaceAll("_", " ") },
      margin: { t: 50 }
    };

    Plotly.newPlot("chart", [trace], layout, {responsive: true});

    // summary
    const latest = values[values.length - 1];
    const first = values[0];
    const change = ((latest - first) / first * 100).toFixed(1);

    document.getElementById("summary").innerHTML = `
      <div style="background:#f5f5f5;padding:15px;border-radius:10px;">
        <strong>Latest value:</strong> ${latest}<br>
        <strong>Change since first year:</strong> %${change}
      </div>
    `;
  }

  drawChart(numericColumns[0]);

  select.addEventListener("change", function() {
    drawChart(this.value);
  });

});
</script>
